suggestions: Multilayer: assign GND/PWR to inner layers; route critical signals on outer layers adjacent to a reference plane (controlled impedance).
Charlieplex/matrix nets: route as a bundle from MCU with matched lengths; keep analog (MIC) on opposite side of board when possible.
Analog nets present: spatial separation from high-di/dt nets; avoid crossing CPX/switcher on same layer.
Differential/I2C pairs: co-route on same layer with matched length (pairs: [('SDA', 'SCL'), ('SCL', 'SDA')]).
Only through vias allowed (KiCad rules): each layer change costs a full through via — prefer same-layer completion (via minimization).

notes: layer_policy: F.Cu~H-preferred, In1.Cu~V-preferred, In2.Cu~H-preferred, B.Cu~V-preferred (free-angle still used when LOS clear)
pair:SDA+SCL prefer same layer / matched length
pair:SCL+SDA prefer same layer / matched length
